hooks.prompt: The user is about to run a Bash command. Check if it is a git commit command (the tool input is: $ARGUMENTS). If it is NOT a git commit command, respond with {"decision": "allow"} and do nothing else. If it IS a git commit command, run `make lint` and `make test` first. If either fails, fix the errors and re-run until they pass. Only then allow the commit to proceed.
hooks.statusMessage: コミット前チェック（lint & test）を実行中...
